preconditions: Guest account logged in and approved accommodations/rooms exist
steps: Open chatbot; send: recommend a hotel in Bayawan for 2 guests under 2000
expected_result: Bot returns recommendation list with dynamic room records and no hard-coded facts

preconditions: Guest logged in and selected room has availability
steps: Send: book room <id> for 2 guests from YYYY-MM-DD to YYYY-MM-DD; confirm booking
expected_result: Booking draft/record created and linked to request.user with billing link

preconditions: Guest logged in and valid room/date input
steps: Send: calculate hotel bill for room <id> for 2 nights
expected_result: Bot returns bill details consistent with room rate x nights

preconditions: Accommodation owner account approved and has accepted accommodation
steps: Open Owner Hub chatbot; send: show my rooms
expected_result: Bot returns owner room summary only for owner-linked accepted accommodations

scenario: Owner asks show my bookings link behavior
expected_result: Bot returns clickable link/button and opens new tab when clicked (no forced redirect)

scenario: Owner room management path from hub
steps: Owner Hub > Manage Rooms > Add/Edit room
expected_result: Room updates persist and reflect in availability list

scenario: Approve owner account then owner access check
expected_result: Owner can log in via admin login and access Owner Hub
Accommodation appears in accepted lists and can be used by guest recommendation queries

preconditions: Admin logged in from admin dashboard
steps: Send: help; send: show my bookings
expected_result: Bot returns admin-mode help and dashboard link behavior

preconditions: Employee logged in from employee dashboard
steps: Send: help; send: show my bookings
expected_result: Bot returns employee-mode help and employee dashboard link

preconditions: Use non-guest role or unauthenticated user
steps: Attempt to submit booking with forged guest identifier
expected_result: Booking ties only to authenticated request.user and rejects unauthenticated request
Chatbot still works using fallback path without system crash
